name: Nolan
archetype: Serious strategist Paladin, level 14, tactical commander
speech_patterns: Speaks concisely with little wasted breath
Frames everything in terms of tactical advantage
quirks: Insists on reviewing the plan before every engagement
Rarely smiles but deeply loyal to allies
example_phrases: We need to consider all possible outcomes before proceeding.
Emotion clouds judgment. Focus on the objective.
This is not about glory. This is about survival.
Every action has a consequence. Make yours count.
I've analyzed their pattern. Here's what we do next.
